titleStmt.title: SII 36.287: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 287. (A.R. No. 287 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Tiruvālīśvara temple.

summary.p: Gift of three vēlis of land as kuḍinīṅgā dēvadāṉam, for conducting daily worship and maintenance of the temple of Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiya Nāyaṉār at Vittūr to the Tāṉattār by the king. Since the dēvadāṉa granted on an earlier occasion became defunct, the king made this new grant. Mentions the land measure, nāṭṭa-aḷavu-kōl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī sakalalokac cakkaravatti
Irācanārāyaṇaṉ vaṭapiṭākaippa
ṟṟu vittūril Uṭaiyār tiruvāla
kkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉār ko
yil tāṉattārkku Iṉṉayiṉārkku
paḻaiya tevatāṉam naṭavātapaṭiyā
le tirunāḷum Eḻuntaruḷāmal tiru
paṇiyum tāḻvāṉatākak keṭṭom
vittūril paḻaiya tevatāṉattile nilam
pattil Aiñcu viṭum Aḷavukku teṭum nilam
viṭaveṇṭiṉa Ittaippaṟṟi muṉpu viṭṭa
nīṅkal Ākap pattu Oṉpatāvatu mutalukku
nāṭṭa Aḷavu
kolāle
mūṉṟu veli ni
lam kaṭṭaḷai
cera viṭṭa A
ḷavukku Immuta
l koṇṭu tiru
nāḷum Eḻuntaruḷu
vittu pūcaiyum
tiruppaṇiyum tā
ḻvaṟa naṭattip
pokavum coṉ
ṉom Iṉṉilam mūṉṟu ve
liyum kuṭinīṅkāt tevatā
ṉam §
Digital edition of SII 36.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
